testcase.name: shouldReturnBadRequestWhenSkuCodeMissing
testcase.system-out: 2026-03-18T12:54:30.302+07:00 INFO 15908 --- [ main] [ ] t.c.s.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils : Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.nhom1.inventory_service.InventoryServiceApplicationTests$IntegrationApi]: IntegrationApi does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 2026-03-18T12:54:30.308+07:00 INFO 15908 --- [ main] [ ] .b.t.c.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper : Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.nhom1.inventory_service.InventoryServiceApplication for test class com.nhom1.inventory_service.InventoryServiceApplicationTests$IntegrationApi 2026-03-18T12:54:30.345+07:00 WARN 15908 --- [ main] [69ba3e1620e06a3edb10ab1f76eefe5a-db10ab1f76eefe5a] .w.s.m.s.DefaultHandlerExceptionResolver : Resolved [org.springframework.web.bind.MissingServletRequestParameterException: Required request parameter 'skuCode' for method parameter type List is not present]

skipped.message: Business decision: blank skuCode is currently accepted
